Thanks for your PR. Fill in the sections below — keep it short, the goal is fast review.
-->

## What

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Screenshots (UI changes only)

<!-- Before / after screenshots or a short Loom for any visible change. Drop them here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`php artisan test`, `pnpm run type-check`)
- [ ] i18n keys added in **both** `resources/js/i18n/en.json` and `resources/js/i18n/fr.json` (if any new user-facing string)
- [ ] No file > 300 lines; no `any`, no `@ts-ignore`, no `console.log`
- [ ] No hardcoded user-facing string
- [ ] No secret committed (`.env`, API keys, passwords)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, …)
- [ ] Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #123, or "n/a" if this is a small docs/typo PR. -->
